EV-WMFWDDFL.title: crime-scene-photo.jpeg
EV-WMFWDDFL.description: The scene is inside a bar with a wooden floor scattered with debris, broken chairs, and bottles. There is a prominent red stain on the floor resembling a spill or blood. The bar counter is visible in the background, with stools in front and a neon 'Bar' sign glowing on the wall.

EV-C8JSJRHR.title: crime-scene-photo-02.jpeg
EV-C8JSJRHR.description: The image depicts an indoor bar scene with overturned stools and chairs scattered across a floor littered with debris. A large, dark red liquid spill resembling blood is prominent on the wooden floor in the foreground, suggesting a recent altercation or incident.

EV-U58R5UO8.title: cctv-image.jpeg
EV-U58R5UO8.description: A person is running down a dimly lit sidewalk in an urban setting with storefronts lining the street. The person appears to be in motion, wearing a green shirt.

EV-T96FQ2FP.title: ring-camera-image.jpeg
EV-T96FQ2FP.description: The image shows an outdoor scene captured by a doorbell camera. A person in a red shirt is running toward the camera on a concrete pathway. There are houses and trees visible in the background. The time and date stamp is visible in the top right corner.

EV-3X55DASX.title: cigarette-crime-scene.png
EV-3X55DASX.description: The image shows a cigarette butt lying on a textured concrete surface, possibly a sidewalk.
